To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

We're excited to welcome Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment. Project Helios is NovaBridge's data integration platform—designed to streamline ingestion from your ERP system, apply configurable transformation rules, and deliver clean data to your reporting platform via secure APIs and webhooks. Given Meridian's focus on reliable live-data pipelines and a smooth path to UAT, Helios should give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To get started, we'll send your access credentials and onboarding documentation separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, a few next steps:

1. Please share Meridian's IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup (as discussed, target by 2026-07-12).
2. Your team will provision UAT environment access by 2026-07-19.
3. We'll aim to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on 2026-07-25.

For technical questions, please reach out to Derek Okafor (Technical Lead) at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, contact Sarah Chen (Project Manager) at s.chen@novabridge.com. Either of us is happy to help.

Please don't hesitate to reach out with any questions—we're looking forward to partnering with you and the Meridian team.

Best regards,
Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com

content.text: Found the draft for Priya Kapoor at Meridian Group. I’ll refine it for a more personalized, professional tone and save the updated version back to the same file.

input.content:
To: Priya Kapoor
Subject: Welcome to the Project Helios Integration Environment

Hi Priya,

On behalf of the NovaBridge team, thank you for partnering with us — we're delighted to welcome you and Meridian Group to the Project Helios integration environment.

We appreciated our recent discussions about Meridian's priorities for reliable live-data pipelines and a streamlined path to UAT. Project Helios, NovaBridge's secure data integration platform, is purpose-built for this — streamlining ERP ingestion, applying configurable transformation rules, and delivering clean, ready-to-use data to your reporting environment via secure APIs and webhooks. We are confident it will give your team the visibility, control, and performance you need from day one.

To ensure a smooth onboarding, you can expect your access credentials and onboarding documentation to follow separately within the next 24 hours. In the meantime, please see the agreed next steps below:

1. Meridian to share IT infrastructure diagram for the integration environment setup — target by July 12, 2026.
2. Meridian to provision UAT environment access — target by July 19, 2026.
3. Joint review to resolve remaining setup items ahead of the stakeholder demo on July 25, 2026.

For any technical questions, please contact Derek Okafor, Technical Lead, at d.okafor@novabridge.com. For project coordination and scheduling, please feel free to contact me directly at s.chen@novabridge.com. We are here to help and will make sure you have prompt support as you get started.

Thank you again for trusting NovaBridge for this important initiative. We're looking forward to working closely with you and the Meridian team.

Warm regards,

Sarah Chen
Project Manager, NovaBridge
s.chen@novabridge.com
